basics.name: Abhinav Khanna
basics.summary: B.Tech Computer Science student at IIT Delhi working on machine learning, robotics, AI safety, and systems.

work.name: SRI International
work.summary: Fine-tuned LLMs for portfolio management using DPO and GRPO; introduced implicit risk sensitivity via preference orderings.

work.name: Wipro AI, Lab45
work.summary: Built deep learning and NLP systems for insurance claim processing and worked with RAG-based workflows.

portfolio.name: AI Safety Guardian
portfolio.description: Vision-language model benchmarking and context augmentation for semantically safe robot navigation.

portfolio.name: Backdoor Attacks on Open-Vocabulary Object Detectors
portfolio.description: Robustness study of Grounding DINO under image-space prompt-tuning triggers.

portfolio.name: Robotic Arm Manipulation in Simulation
portfolio.description: PyBullet control for Franka Emika pick-and-place tasks over irregular objects.
